Department of Industrial Engineering

Our Mission

MENU

The aim of our department is to
contribute to the development of science and technology in the field of
industrial engineering, to train industrial engineers with the qualifications
required by the application areas, to contribute to the solution of the
problems of practitioners at different levels as a solution partner and thus to
contribute to the development of our country.

Mission

The mission of the Department of Industrial Engineering is to educate engineers with systematic thinking skills, capable of developing analytical approaches, following and applying technological advancements, adhering to ethical values, and considering environmental and societal impacts; to generate academic knowledge and to develop solutions that add value to society through collaborations with industry.

Vision

The vision of the Department of Industrial Engineering is to become a leading department that educates industrial engineers who design sustainable systems, compete at the global level through scientific research, innovative thinking, and social responsibility.
